utility_details.utility_summary: Both wi_skills and wo_skills produced high-quality, comprehensive Phalaenopsis care guides that passed all six evaluation criteria. However, wi_skills produced a notably more detailed document (8969 bytes vs 5838 bytes) with more depth in areas like watering (explicitly addressing the ice-cube myth, root color visual cues through clear pots, water quality advice), more specific bloom-trigger conditions (exact temperature range of 55–65°F for 4–6 weeks), and a richer overall structure.
